name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0
description: borrower_name is required for Syndicated Credit Agreement extraction.

name: administrative_agent_name_present
expression: administrative_agent_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(administrative_agent_name)) > 0
description: administrative_agent_name is required for Syndicated Credit Agreement extraction.

name: total_commitment_amount_present
expression: total_commitment_amount IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(total_commitment_amount)) > 0
description: total_commitment_amount is required for Syndicated Credit Agreement extraction.

name: total_commitment_amount_non_negative
description: total_commitment_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: commitment_fee_non_negative
description: commitment_fee should be non-negative when present.

name: assignment_minimum_amount_non_negative
description: assignment_minimum_amount should be non-negative when present.
